commentaries.author: Justin Martyr
commentaries.content: But I say unto you, Pray for your enemies, and love them that hate you, and bless them that curse you, and pray for them that despitefully use you."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Upon the Pharisees and doctors of the law.

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: In the same manner it is written inn the Gospel: "Bless them that curse you."
